title: buccella bucculenta
intro: Buccella bucculenta, also known as the False Toothwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Borage family. It is primarily found in Europe and Western Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Buccella bucculenta can be consumed as infusions or used topically as a treatment for wounds and skin irritations, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing.
